{{Infobox character
| name = Tiberian Arelius
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
| name = Tiberian Arelius
| aliases = Ozmanthus Tiberian Mereithan Arelius, Tiberian, Monarch Tiberian Arelius
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Monarch of House Arelius, Storm King, Patriarch of House Arelius, leader of the Arelius clan, Underlord, prince of House Arelius
| abilities = spiritual attacks, Pure Storm Baptism, large thunderbolt attack, spearman, bloodline ability
| affiliations = House Arelius, Arelius clan
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Tiberian Arelius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Tiberian Arelius, also known as the [[Storm King]], was a powerful [[Monarch]] and the Patriarch of [[House Arelius]] who once ruled over much of the [[Rosegold continent]]. A highly skilled [[sacred artist]], he was recognized for his polished fighting style and mastery of spiritual attacks involving lightning. He developed the [[Pure Storm Baptism]], a technique designed to repair long-term soul damage, and was known for his research into storms. During his reign, he maintained a tense peace with the neighboring [[House Shen]] and brought his clan into an era of prosperity. Tiberian's ambitions were centered on the elimination of the [[Dreadgods]], a goal he pursued after being influenced by his advisor to embark on an ambitious project. This pursuit led to the [[Dread War]], a conflict that resulted in the death of the previous generation of [[Monarchs]] and caused significant destruction across the [[Rosegold continent]]. Tiberian was eventually killed during a battle involving the [[Weeping Dragon]] and [[Reigan Shen]]. His death occurred approximately eight years prior to recent events, leaving his descendants to maintain the influence of [[House Arelius]] across various continents.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The report mentions the life and death of [[Tiberian Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Tiberian Arelius]] was the [[Monarch]] of [[House Arelius]] who died eight years ago.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As the [[Storm King]] and Patriarch of [[House Arelius]], Tiberian Arelius ruled from his own palace with [[Eithan]] serving as his advisor. He became widely recognized for his ability to perform spiritual attacks and for the creation of the [[Pure Storm Baptism]]. During his reign, he utilized specific terminology that [[Northstrider]] noted was identical to words previously used by [[Reigan Shen]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] was an advisor to Tiberian.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Tiberian has a palace.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Tiberian Arelius]] was the [[Storm King]] and Patriarch of [[House Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Tiberian Arelius]] was known for spiritual attacks and created the [[Pure Storm Baptism]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Tiberian Arelius]] once used words that [[Northstrider]] remembered [[Reigan Shen]] using.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Tiberian Arelius]] is a creator.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Tiberian Arelius]] was a [[Monarch]] and an advisor to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Tiberian once showed [[Reigan Shen]] the key to the western labyrinth.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Tiberian is deceased.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|As the [[Monarch]] and leader of the Arelius clan, Tiberian Arelius possessed blue eyes characterized by crackling lightning. Early in his advancement, he was accompanied by an advisor named [[Eithan]], who built a reputation with the leader through his insight into the first Patriarch's memories. Tiberian harbored a dream to rid the world of the [[Dreadgods]] by having them killed and ascended, though he was ultimately no match for [[Reigan Shen]]. Even as a [[Remnant]], his spirit remained at least as dense as [[Little Blue]] or [[Ruby]], possessing a voice like buzzing lightning and a golden collar around its throat. This [[Remnant]] existed as a [[Monarch]] without the eroding effects of a months-of-[[hunger aura]], and Tiberian had previously sworn [[Eithan]] to silence regarding certain matters.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Tiberian Arelius]] has blue eyes with lightning crackling behind them.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Tiberian Arelius]] has an advisor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tiberian was the [[Monarch]] and leader of the Arelius clan.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] was the advisor to the [[Monarch]] [[Tiberian Arelius]] early in his advancement.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Tiberian Arelius]] was a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] formed his reputation with Tiberian through insight into the first Patriarch's memories.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tiberian is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Tiberian's Remnant]] is a [[Monarch]] without months of [[hunger aura]] eroding his spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Tiberian's Remnant]] has a golden collar encircling its throat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Tiberian's Remnant]] has a voice like buzzing lightning.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Tiberian's Remnant]] is a spirit at least as dense as [[Little Blue]] or [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] intends to fulfill Tiberian's dream.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tiberian's dream was to rid the world of the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tiberian was not a match for [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tiberian wanted the [[Dreadgods]] killed and for them to ascend.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Tiberian swore [[Eithan]] to silence on certain issues.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Tiberian Arelius is a storm-[[Remnant]] characterized by a beard hewn from lightning. During his history, he shared a close bond with [[Reigan Shen]], who may have been his best friend. Tiberian once unleashed a massive thunderbolt attack and presented [[Cladia]] with a treasure. Although Sha Miara claims that [[Reigan Shen]] betrayed him, the [[Remnant]] Reigan is currently working to repair Tiberian.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] might have been Tiberian's best friend.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Tiberian used a large thunderbolt attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Tiberian gave [[Cladia]] a treasure.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Tiberian is a character whose [[Remnant]] Reigan is repairing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Sha Miara claims [[Reigan Shen]] betrayed Tiberian.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Tiberian has a beard hewn from lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Tiberian is a storm-[[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A prince of [[House Arelius]], Tiberian Arelius is a human [[Underlord]] recognized as the second-best of his age. During his youth, he participated as a combatant in the first [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. As a spearman, his weapon crackles with multicolored lightning, and he utilizes an [[Enforcer technique]] involving three-colored bolts. His [[madra]] shifts between the forms of a powerful gust, a fluid river, and a devastating thunderbolt. This blond-haired warrior possesses eyes that crackle with blue electricity and a bloodline ability that allows him to move as if he has already foreseen the progression of a fight. In his encounter with Reigan, Tiberian acted as an opponent who laughed and clapped the man on the back.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]] is a man with short blond hair and eyes that crackle with blue electricity.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]] is the second-best [[Underlord]] of his age.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]] is a spearman whose weapon crackles with multicolored lightning.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]]'s [[madra]] shifts between a fluid river, a powerful gust, and a devastating thunderbolt.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]] is a human opponent of Reigan.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Tiberian is an [[Arelius Underlord]] who uses a spear.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Tiberian possesses a bloodline ability that allows him to move as if he has seen the fight play out in advance.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]] is a prince of [[House Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Tiberian Arelius]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]] involving three-colored lightning.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Tiberian is a character who laughed and clapped Reigan on the back.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A young [[Tiberian Arelius]] fought in the first [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|"Greetings from Tiberian," the Monarch said.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|"Eithan," the Remnant said, with a voice like buzzing lightning.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I knew he was going to give me up. He betrayed Tiberian too.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|"You’re not ready." "Of course I am. He’s only human."<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Arelius family]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
